title: Magex's Warden Elytra
description: A resource pack that makes the Elytra Warden-Themed
body:
If you **enjoy** this resource pack, consider supporting me on [buymeacoffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/magex_ya)!

# About

**Magex's Warden Elytra Retextured** is a retextured new version﻿ of **Magex's Warden Elytra**. Since I made the old version my pixel art skills have improved greatly so I did a retexture. Hope u like it :)


# Features

Retextured Elytra, 
Emissive Elytra texture (OptiFine), 
Retextured Elytra item﻿
